title: Oportun Financial Corporation (OPRT) Q2 2023 Earnings
text: Oportun Financial Corporation delivered Q2 2023 earnings of $0.06 per share, surpassing the consensus estimate of a loss of $0.21 per share. This represented a substantial turnaround from the prior year's earnings of $0.11 per share. The company achieved an earnings surprise of 128.57%, demonstrating significant outperformance versus Wall Street expectations. The company generated $266.6 million in quarterly revenue, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 6.10%. This reflected year-over-year growth from $225.8 million in the prior year period. Despite the positive earnings beat, analysts remained cautious. The stock carries a Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) rating, suggesting shares are expected to underperform the market. The consensus EPS forecast for the following quarter stands at $0.27, with full-year estimates at a loss of $2.02 per share on $997.6 million in revenues. The Financial - Miscellaneous Services industry ranks in the bottom 31% of Zacks industries.
